Integrations Module

Select an operation from the sidebar to view its complete SOAP payload with version-specific field filtering.

Press / to search across 34 operations  ·  12 Read  ·  22 Write

All SOAP operations use HTTP POST — "Read" and "Write" indicate the Workday operation category, not the HTTP method.

Version map sourced from Workday XSD v30.0–v46.0 via recursive type-tree diff

🔴 SOAP Envelope Faults — 3 faults returned by ALL operations ▶

These 3 faults are defined in the Workday WSDL and can be returned by any operation. They are standard SOAP envelope-level errors — not operation-specific. All return HTTP 500 with a <soapenv:Fault> wrapper.

Fault When It Occurs faultcode
Authentication_Fault Invalid credentials, ISU disabled, missing <wsse:Security> header, or expired token soapenv:Client
Validation_Fault Invalid data in the request — bad WID/Reference_ID, missing required field, date range error, enumeration mismatch, business rule violation soapenv:Client
Processing_Fault Workday server error — business process lock, tenant configuration issue, system limit exceeded, or transient internal error soapenv:Server
Response format (all 3 faults):
<soapenv:Fault>
  <faultcode>soapenv:Client</faultcode>
  <faultstring>Validation error occurred.</faultstring>
  <detail>
    <wd:Workday_Common_Header>
      <wd:Validation_Fault>
        <wd:Message>The value 'X' is not valid ...</wd:Message>
      </wd:Validation_Fault>
    </wd:Workday_Common_Header>
  </detail>
</soapenv:Fault>

ⓘ Workday always returns HTTP 500 for SOAP faults regardless of fault type. Parse <faultcode> and <detail> to distinguish the error.

Get_Business_Process_Delegations

Read Integrations • v46.0 50 validations 1KB req / 3KB resp
POSTPOST https://{tenant}.workday.com/ccx/service/{tenant}/Integrations/v46.0
📌 API Version: Updates Request & Response  ·  Sourced from Workday XSD v30.0–v46.0
50Validations
11Request Fields
30Response Fields
Read SOAP Op
📖 Description

Retrieves delegations that are currently configured.

🔐 Contextual Security 🔓 No

This operation does not apply Contextual Security. The ISU sees all data it has general security access to.

🔗 Endpoint
POST POST https://{tenant}.workday.com/ccx/service/{tenant}/Integrations/v46.0
🌐 REST API Equivalent   common v1
/businessTitleChanges/{ID}[common v1]GETRetrieves a business title change instance.
/workers/{ID}/businessTitleChanges[common v1]GETPOSTRetrieves a collection of business title changes for a specific worker.
/workers/{ID}/businessTitleChanges?type=me[common v1]POST
/workers/{ID}/businessTitleChanges/{subresourceID}[common v1]GETRetrieves a business title change instance for a specific worker.
SOAP Request — Get_Business_Process_Delegations41 version-gated fields
v46.0
SOAP Response — Get_Business_Process_Delegations
v46.0
✓ Data Source: Official Workday API Docs  —  50 validation messages scraped directly from the Workday Community Operation Details page for this operation. These are the exact runtime error messages Workday returns.  🔧 50 Fix suggestions

Field / ElementOfficial Error Message (Workday API Docs)Description🔧 Fix / How to ResolveSource

Operation_LevelPage Number cannot be zero.Page number cannot be zero.Set Page_Number to 1 or higher in the Response_Filter.API Docs
Current_Delegation_DataThis request removes all current delegations for [worker]. To remove all delegations, specify Stop All Delegations.This request removes all current delegations for <worker>. To remove all delegations, specify Stop All Delegations.Provide the required value as described. Check the field name and supply a valid entry.API Docs
Current_Delegation_DataYou can only set up delegations for individuals with a worker role.You can only set up delegations for individuals with a worker role.Supply a valid Worker_Reference. The worker must be active (or pre-hire) and accessible to the processing user.API Docs
Current_Delegation_DataSpecify a valid worker as the delegator for this delegation request. Example: A terminated worker isn't a valid worker and can't be a delegator.Specify a valid worker as the delegator for this delegation request. Example: A terminated worker isn't a valid worker and can't be a delegator.Specify a valid worker as the delegator for this delegation request. Example: A terminated worker isn't a valid worker and can't be a delegator.API Docs
Business_Process_Delegation_Data [Choice]Delegation Begin Date is required and must have a valueDelegation Begin Date is required and must have a valueInclude a non-empty value for "Delegation Begin Date" in the request.API Docs
Business_Process_Delegation_Data [Choice]Specify an end date that's greater than or equal to this begin date: [bd].Specify an end date that's greater than or equal to the begin date.Specify an end date that's greater than or equal to this begin date: [bd].API Docs
Business_Process_Delegation_Data [Choice]You can't select a specific business process and also select all business processes to delegate at the same time. Specify either For all Business Processes option or For Business Process option and the business processes you want to delegate.You can't select a specific business process and also select all business processes to delegate at the same time. Specify either For all Business Processes option or For Business Process option and the business processes you want to delegate.Review delegation setup: ensure the delegator has a worker role, the delegate is active, and the relevant Business Process is enabled for delegation in BP configuration.API Docs
Business_Process_Delegation_Data [Choice]Specify the delegation end date.Specify the delegation end date.Specify the delegation end date.API Docs
Business_Process_Delegation_Data [Choice]Specify business processes to delegate.Specify business processes to delegate.Specify business processes to delegate.API Docs
Business_Process_Delegation_Data [Choice]To delegate a business process, you must enable the Allow Business Process Delegation field on the business process security policy.To delegate a business process, you must enable the Allow Business Process Delegation field on the business process security policy.The current ISU or user lacks the required security group access. Grant the appropriate security group membership in Workday security configuration.API Docs
Business_Process_Delegation_Data [Choice]Specify valid delegation rules for the business processes. When you specify For all Business Processes and also specify delegation rules, the rules must be valid for all business processes.Specify valid delegation rules for the business processes. When you specify For all Business Processes and also specify delegation rules, the rules must be valid for all business processes.Specify valid delegation rules for the business processes. When you specify For all Business Processes and also specify delegation rules, the rules must be valid for all business processes.API Docs
Business_Process_Delegation_Data [Choice]Delegate is required and must have a valueDelegate is required and must have a valueInclude a non-empty value for "Delegate" in the request.API Docs
Business_Process_Delegation_Data [Choice]You can't make changes to a business process delegation that's not active for the specified delegator.You can't make changes to a business process delegation that's not active for the specified delegator.Review delegation setup: ensure the delegator has a worker role, the delegate is active, and the relevant Business Process is enabled for delegation in BP configuration.API Docs
Business_Process_Delegation_Data [Choice]There's a pending delegation change for the delegator. Until the change is approved, you can't create a new delegation or update an existing delegation for this delegator.There's a pending delegation change for the delegator. Until the change is approved, you can't create a new delegation or update an existing delegation for this delegator.Review delegation setup: ensure the delegator has a worker role, the delegate is active, and the relevant Business Process is enabled for delegation in BP configuration.API Docs
Business_Process_Delegation_Data [Choice]To remove a delegation, you must specify a valid reference ID.To remove a delegation, you must specify a valid reference ID.Review delegation setup: ensure the delegator has a worker role, the delegate is active, and the relevant Business Process is enabled for delegation in BP configuration.API Docs
Business_Process_Delegation_Data [Choice]Specify a valid delegation reference ID that doesn't contain HIST or PEND in the ID.Specify a valid delegation reference ID that doesn't contain HIST or PEND in the ID.Specify a valid delegation reference ID that doesn't contain HIST or PEND in the ID.API Docs
Business_Process_Delegation_Data [Choice]You can't submit multiple delegation rows for the same delegation reference ID.You can't submit multiple delegation rows for the same delegation reference ID.Review delegation setup: ensure the delegator has a worker role, the delegate is active, and the relevant Business Process is enabled for delegation in BP configuration.API Docs
Business_Process_Delegation_Data [Choice]You can't specify an Alternate Delegate because you didn't enable the Apply Routing Restrictions during Delegation field on the tenant setup for business processes.You can't specify an Alternate Delegate because you didn't enable the Apply Routing Restrictions during Delegation field on the tenant setup for business processes.Review delegation setup: ensure the delegator has a worker role, the delegate is active, and the relevant Business Process is enabled for delegation in BP configuration.API Docs
Business_Process_Delegation_Data [Choice]Specify a valid Alternate Delegate.Specify a valid Alternate Delegate.Specify a valid Alternate Delegate.API Docs
Business_Process_Delegation_Data [Choice]Specify a value for Alternate Delegate that isn't the delegate or delegator.Specify a value for Alternate Delegate that isn't the delegate or delegator.Specify a value for Alternate Delegate that isn't the delegate or delegator.API Docs
Business_Process_Delegation_Data [Choice]Specify a valid worker as the delegate for this delegation request. Examples: A terminated worker can't be a delegate. The delegator and delegate for the delegation request can't be the same worker. You can only specify a delegate that's determined by the Users Can Delegate Tasks To prompt configuration on the Edit Tenant Setup - Business Process task.Specify a valid worker as the delegate for this delegation request. Examples: A terminated worker can't be a delegate. The delegator and delegate for the delegation request can't be the same worker. You can only specify a delegate that's determined by the Users Can Delegate Tasks To prompt configuration on the Edit Tenant Setup - Business Process task.Specify a valid worker as the delegate for this delegation request. Examples: A terminated worker can't be a delegate. The delegator and delegate for the delegation request can't be the same worker. You can only specify a delegate that's determined by the Users Can Delegate Tasks To prompt configuration on the Edit Tenant Setup - Business Process task.API Docs
Business_Process_Delegation_Data [Choice]You can only specify initiating actions that the delegator has security access to delegate. The delegator must be part of a security group on the business process security policy.You can only specify initiating actions that the delegator has security access to delegate. The delegator must be part of a security group on the business process security policy.The current ISU or user lacks the required security group access. Grant the appropriate security group membership in Workday security configuration.API Docs
Business_Process_Delegation_Data [Choice]You can only specify a person with a worker role as a delegate for this delegation request.You can only specify a person with a worker role as a delegate for this delegation request.Review delegation setup: ensure the delegator has a worker role, the delegate is active, and the relevant Business Process is enabled for delegation in BP configuration.API Docs
Business_Process_Delegation_Data [Choice]You can only specify a person with a worker role as an alternate delegate for this delegation request.You can only specify a person with a worker role as an alternate delegate for this delegation request.Review delegation setup: ensure the delegator has a worker role, the delegate is active, and the relevant Business Process is enabled for delegation in BP configuration.API Docs
Business_Process_Delegation_Data [Choice]You can't submit this new delegation configuration because a delegation already exists with identical values for the following fields: Delegator, Begin Date, End Date, Delegate, and Business Process.You can't submit this new delegation configuration because a delegation already exists with identical values for the following fields: Delegator, Begin Date, End Date, Delegate, and Business Process.This entry already exists. Check for duplicates before submitting.API Docs

No description available — run step2f_extract_op_context.py to populate.

POST POST https://{tenant}.workday.com/ccx/service/{tenant}/Integrations/v46.0
🌐 REST API Equivalent   businessProcess v1
/events[businessProcess v1]GETRetrieves business process events.
/eventSteps[businessProcess v1]GETRetrieves business process event steps.
/events/{ID}[businessProcess v1]GETRetrieves a business process event.
/eventSteps/{ID}[businessProcess v1]GETRetrieves a business process event step.
/events/{ID}/cancel[businessProcess v1]POSTCancels a business process event.
/events/{ID}/rescind[businessProcess v1]POSTRescinds a business process event.
/eventSteps/{ID}/toDo[businessProcess v1]POSTPost an action for a To Do step in a business process.
/events/{ID}/comments[businessProcess v1]GETRetrieves comments for a business process event.
/eventSteps/{ID}/deny[businessProcess v1]POSTDenies a business process event step.
/events/{ID}/attachments[businessProcess v1]GETRetrieves attachments for a business process event.

The XSD Rule column cites the exact schema constraint. The Fix column contains [COMMENT] guidance — clearly marked as interpretation, not official documentation.
7 validations
Field / ElementError MessageWhen This OccursXSD Rule (Source)Fix
Request_ReferencesRequired element 'Request_References' is missing.The 'Request_References' element is absent from the request body.minOccurs=1 (required element — XSD default)[COMMENT] Always include <bsvc:Request_References>...</bsvc:Request_References> in your SOAP request. This element is mandatory per the XSD schema.
Request_References / Event_ReferenceRequired element 'Event_Reference' is missing.The 'Event_Reference' element is absent from the request body.minOccurs=1 (required element — XSD default)[COMMENT] Always include <bsvc:Event_Reference>...</bsvc:Event_Reference> in your SOAP request. This element is mandatory per the XSD schema.
Request_References / Event_ReferenceInvalid or not-found reference for 'Event_Reference'.The ID value supplied in 'Event_Reference' does not match any active record of type 'Action_EventObjectType' in the tenant.type=wd:Action_EventObjectType (Workday ObjectType — reference lookup)[COMMENT] Verify the reference ID exists by running the corresponding Get_ operation first. Ensure the ID type attribute matches the expected reference type (e.g. bsvc:type="Action_Event_ID").
Request_Criteria / Exclude_Process_History_DataInvalid boolean value for 'Exclude_Process_History_Data'.Value is not 'true' or 'false' (case-sensitive in strict XML).type=xsd:boolean (XSD boolean primitive)[COMMENT] Use lowercase 'true' or 'false'. Workday also accepts '1' (true) and '0' (false) for xs:boolean.
Request_Criteria / Exclude_Remaining_Step_DataInvalid boolean value for 'Exclude_Remaining_Step_Data'.Value is not 'true' or 'false' (case-sensitive in strict XML).type=xsd:boolean (XSD boolean primitive)[COMMENT] Use lowercase 'true' or 'false'. Workday also accepts '1' (true) and '0' (false) for xs:boolean.
Response_Filter / As_Of_Effective_DateInvalid date format for 'As_Of_Effective_Date'.The value supplied is not a valid xs:date string.type=xs:date (XSD date/time primitive)[COMMENT] Provide date in {'YYYY-MM-DD' if fmt == 'date' else 'YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ'} format (ISO 8601). Example: 2024-06-15.
Response_Filter / As_Of_Entry_DateTimeInvalid date format for 'As_Of_Entry_DateTime'.The value supplied is not a valid xs:dateTime string.type=xs:dateTime (XSD date/time primitive)[COMMENT] Provide date in {'YYYY-MM-DD' if fmt == 'date' else 'YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ'} format (ISO 8601). Example: 2024-06-15T09:00:00Z.

Get_Event_Documents

Read Integrations • v46.0 2 validations 1KB req / 2KB resp
POSTPOST https://{tenant}.workday.com/ccx/service/{tenant}/Integrations/v46.0
📌 API Version: Updates Request & Response  ·  Sourced from Workday XSD v30.0–v46.0
2Validations
0Request Fields
0Response Fields
Read SOAP Op
📖 Description

This operation will retrieve data related to any Documents that may be available to an Integration Event.

🔐 Contextual Security 🔓 No

This operation does not apply Contextual Security. The ISU sees all data it has general security access to.

🔗 Endpoint
POST POST https://{tenant}.workday.com/ccx/service/{tenant}/Integrations/v46.0
🌐 REST API Equivalent   businessProcess v1
/events[businessProcess v1]GETRetrieves business process events.
/eventSteps[businessProcess v1]GETRetrieves business process event steps.
/events/{ID}[businessProcess v1]GETRetrieves a business process event.
/eventSteps/{ID}[businessProcess v1]GETRetrieves a business process event step.
/events/{ID}/cancel[businessProcess v1]POSTCancels a business process event.
/events/{ID}/rescind[businessProcess v1]POSTRescinds a business process event.
/eventSteps/{ID}/toDo[businessProcess v1]POSTPost an action for a To Do step in a business process.
/events/{ID}/comments[businessProcess v1]GETRetrieves comments for a business process event.
/eventSteps/{ID}/deny[businessProcess v1]POSTDenies a business process event step.
/events/{ID}/attachments[businessProcess v1]GETRetrieves attachments for a business process event.
⚠ No version-specific field data for this operation — version change updates the version string in the SOAP header

Get_Hide_Workday_Delivered_Report

Read Integrations • v46.0 3 validations 1KB req / 1KB resp
POSTPOST https://{tenant}.workday.com/ccx/service/{tenant}/Integrations/v46.0
📌 API Version: Updates Request & Response  ·  Sourced from Workday XSD v30.0–v46.0
3Validations
11Request Fields
15Response Fields
Read SOAP Op
📖 Description

Retrieves hidden Workday delivered reports.

🔐 Contextual Security 🔓 No

This operation does not apply Contextual Security. The ISU sees all data it has general security access to.

🔗 Endpoint
POST POST https://{tenant}.workday.com/ccx/service/{tenant}/Integrations/v46.0
🌐 REST API Equivalent   common v1
/workers/{ID}/directReports[common v1]GETRetrieves a collection of direct reports for a specific worker.
/workers/{ID}/directReports/{subresourceID}[common v1]GETRetrieves a direct report instance for a specific worker.

Get_Import_Process_Messages

Read Integrations • v46.0 2 validations 1KB req / 2KB resp
POSTPOST https://{tenant}.workday.com/ccx/service/{tenant}/Integrations/v46.0
📌 API Version: Updates Request & Response  ·  Sourced from Workday XSD v30.0–v46.0
2Validations
0Request Fields
1Response Fields
Read SOAP Op
📖 Description

Gets messages associated to a specific Import Process event.

🔐 Contextual Security 🔓 No

This operation does not apply Contextual Security. The ISU sees all data it has general security access to.

🔗 Endpoint
POST POST https://{tenant}.workday.com/ccx/service/{tenant}/Integrations/v46.0
🌐 REST API
No direct REST equivalent found across: connect v2, businessProcess v1, common v1.
This SOAP operation may be SOAP-only, or the resource uses a different naming convention in the REST API.
⚠ No version-specific field data for this operation — version change updates the version string in the SOAP header

SOAP Response — Get_Import_Process_Messages
v46.0

Get_Integration_Events

Read Integrations • v46.0 10 validations 1KB req / 8KB resp
POSTPOST https://{tenant}.workday.com/ccx/service/{tenant}/Integrations/v46.0
📌 API Version: Updates Request & Response  ·  Sourced from Workday XSD v30.0–v46.0
10Validations
0Request Fields
4Response Fields
Read SOAP Op
📖 Description

This operation will retrieve data related to an execution of an Integration Event. Data included will be Integration System, Launch datetime, Triggering User, Status and Runtime Parameters.

🔐 Contextual Security 🔓 No

This operation does not apply Contextual Security. The ISU sees all data it has general security access to.

🔗 Endpoint
POST POST https://{tenant}.workday.com/ccx/service/{tenant}/Integrations/v46.0
🌐 REST API Equivalent   businessProcess v1
/events[businessProcess v1]GETRetrieves business process events.
/eventSteps[businessProcess v1]GETRetrieves business process event steps.
/events/{ID}[businessProcess v1]GETRetrieves a business process event.
/eventSteps/{ID}[businessProcess v1]GETRetrieves a business process event step.
/events/{ID}/cancel[businessProcess v1]POSTCancels a business process event.
/events/{ID}/rescind[businessProcess v1]POSTRescinds a business process event.
/eventSteps/{ID}/toDo[businessProcess v1]POSTPost an action for a To Do step in a business process.
/events/{ID}/comments[businessProcess v1]GETRetrieves comments for a business process event.
/eventSteps/{ID}/deny[businessProcess v1]POSTDenies a business process event step.
/events/{ID}/attachments[businessProcess v1]GETRetrieves attachments for a business process event.
⚠ No version-specific field data for this operation — version change updates the version string in the SOAP header
SOAP Request — Get_Integration_Events4 version-gated fields
v46.0
SOAP Response — Get_Integration_Events
v46.0

Response_FilterPage Number cannot be zero.Page number cannot be zero.Set Page_Number to 1 or higher in the Response_Filter.API Docs

Integration_System_ReferenceIntegration Event must be valid for Integration System if both are provided.Integration Event must be valid for Integration System if both are provided.Review the Integration System configuration. Integration_System_ReferenceIntegration System is required when creating an instance of Integration Event.Integration System is required when creating an instance of Integration Event.Review the Integration System configuration. Process_DescriptionProcess Description is required when creating an instance of Integration Event.Process Description is required when creating an instance of Integration Event.Provide a non-empty value for this required field.API Docs
Percent_CompletePercent Complete is only allowed to be updated through a web service request when the corresponding Integration Template allows for this.Percent Complete is only allowed to be updated through a web service request when the corresponding Integration Template allows for this.Review the Integration System configuration. Ensure the correct template type is selected and all required components are defined.API Docs
Percent_Complete% Complete cannot be greater than 100%.% Complete cannot be greater than 100%.Set Percent_Complete to a value between 0 and 100.API Docs

13Validations
0Request Fields

Read SOAP Op
📖 Description

This operation will retrieve data related to Workday Accounts associated to an Integration System.

🔐 Contextual Security 🔓 No

This operation does not apply Contextual Security. The ISU sees all data it has general security access to.

🔗 Endpoint
POST POST https://{tenant}.workday.com/ccx/service/{tenant}/Integrations/v46.0

Integration_System_User_DataSystem User to be assigned to an Integration System must not be a Worker or Implementer, nor may it already be associated with a different Integration System. Either choose another System User or create a new one.System User to be assigned to an Integration System must not be a Worker or Implementer, nor may it already be associated with a different Integration System. Integration_System_User_DataPassword is required when creating a new Workday Account.Password is required when creating a new Workday Account.Include a Password element with a valid value in the request.API Docs
Password [Choice]The password does not meet password requirements.Password must meet password requirements.Ensure the password contains the required mix of uppercase, lowercase, numbers, and special characters as configured in your tenant's password policy.API Docs
Session_Timeout_MinutesSession Timeout Minutes must be greater than 5 and less than or equal to [max]. The default value is [default].Set the value to be greater than 5 and no more than [max]. The default value is [default].API Docs

If neither of these options is set, this element data is not required.This validation requires user to set either X509 Token Authentication or SAML Token Authentication when setting up a new Web Service Security Configuration.The current ISU or user lacks the required security group access. Grant the appropriate security group membership in Workday security configuration.API Docs

X509_Public_Key_ReferenceX509 Public Key is required when X509 Token Authentication is enabled.Configure the required authentication certificate or SAML identity provider in Workday Security → Integration System Security settings.API Docs
SAML_IssuerAn identifier of the SAML Identity Provider is required when SAML authentication is enabled.Configure the required authentication certificate or SAML identity provider in Workday Security → Integration System Security settings.API Docs
Identity_Provider_Public_Key_ReferenceAn x509 Certificate Reference is needed to Enable SAML Access.Configure the required authentication certificate or SAML identity provider in Workday Security → Integration System Security settings.API Docs

Get_Integration_Systems

Read Integrations • v46.0 206 validations 2KB req / 82KB resp
POSTPOST https://{tenant}.workday.com/ccx/service/{tenant}/Integrations/v46.0
📌 API Version: Updates Request & Response  ·  Sourced from Workday XSD v30.0–v46.0
206Validations
1Request Fields
53Response Fields
Read SOAP Op
📖 Description

This operation will retrieve data related to an Integration System. Data returned within the response includes Services associated and enabled, Attribute/Map values, Service configurations and Custom Services Attributes, Maps and Launch Parameters.

🔐 Contextual Security 🔓 No

This operation does not apply Contextual Security. The ISU sees all data it has general security access to.

🔗 Endpoint
POST POST https://{tenant}.workday.com/ccx/service/{tenant}/Integrations/v46.0
🌐 REST API
No direct REST equivalent found across: connect v2, businessProcess v1, common v1.
This SOAP operation may be SOAP-only, or the resource uses a different naming convention in the REST API.
SOAP Request — Get_Integration_Systems54 version-gated fields

Integration_System_DataCustom Launch Parameters may only be added to an Integration System using an Integration Template that allows for the Custom Integration Feature of "Generic Service".Custom Launch Parameters may only be added to an Integration System using an Integration Template that allows for the Custom Integration Feature of "Generic Service".Review the Integration System configuration. Integration_System_DataThe following subelements are not valid when using the integration template Enterprise Interface Builder: Integration Attributes Data, Integration Maps Data, Custom Attribute Data, Custom Map Data, Custom Launch Parameter Data, Subscription Data.The following subelements are not valid when using the integration template Enterprise Interface Builder: Integration Attributes Data, Integration Maps Data, Custom Attribute Data, Custom Map Data, Custom Launch Parameter Data, Subscription Data.Verify the EIB integration system configuration: ensure it has a valid Data Source, Transport Protocol, and Transformation set for the current environment.API Docs

Job_Integration_Delivery_Configuration_DataMultiple delivery methods have conflicting Restricted To and Preview configurations. Multiple delivery methods are configured without any Restricted To and/or Preview Only options.Resolve conflicting "delivery methods" entries. Ensure each configuration is unique with no overlapping or contradictory settings.API Docs
Job_Integration_Delivery_Configuration_DataMultiple delivery methods have conflicting Restricted To and Preview Only configurations. Delivery methods cannot be restricted to the same environment unless they have different Preview Only configurations.Remove extra entries — only one value is allowed for this field.API Docs
Job_Integration_Transformation_Configuration_DataTemplate Models can only be used with matching Web Service Spreadsheet Templates and Operations.Template Models can only be used with matching Web Service Spreadsheet Templates and Operations.API Docs
Job_Integration_Retrieval_Configuration_DataMultiple Data Sources cannot be restricted to the same environment or to no environment. Use the "Restricted To" field.Remove extra entries — only one value is allowed for this field.API Docs
Operation_LevelAn Integration Sequencer can not have multiple sequences that use the same OMS Environment RestrictionReview the Integration System configuration. Ensure the correct template type is selected and all required components are defined.API Docs

Ensure the correct template type is selected and all required components are defined.API Docs

Valid External Parameters for this field are: [valid parms]API Docs

Parameter_Initialization_DataReport Prompt Reference can only be used with a Parameter Initialization Operator Reference of Report PromptReport Prompt Reference can only be used with a Parameter Initialization Operator Reference of Report PromptReport Prompt Reference can only be used with a Parameter Initialization Operator Reference of Report Prompt.API Docs
Parameter_Initialization_DataIntegration Parameter Reference can only be used with a Parameter Initialization Operator Reference of "Document Parameter"Integration Parameter Reference can only be used with a Parameter Initialization Operator Reference of "Document Parameter"Integration Parameter Reference can only be used with a Parameter Initialization Operator Reference of "Document Parameter".API Docs
Operation_LevelExternal Parameter ([parm]) not valid for External Field ([field]). Valid External Parameters for this field are: [valid parms]External Parameter must be valid for External Field.External Parameter ([parm]) not valid for External Field ([field]). Valid External Parameters for this field are: [valid parms]API Docs

Integration_Document_Field_for_Field_Override_DataField Override is not allowed for this Document Field (and Stack level within Document).Field Override is not allowed for this Document Field (and Stack level within Document).API Docs
Integration_Document_Field_for_Document_Extension_DataExtended Field Override is not allowed for this Document.Extended Field Override is not allowed for this Document.API Docs
Integration_Document_Field_for_Document_Extension_DataExtended Field Override is allowed for this Document. However, Sub-Documents are not allowed - only Fields.Extended Field Override is allowed for this Document. However, Sub-Documents are not allowed - only Fields.API Docs
Integration_Field_Override_Parameter_Initialization_DataExternal Parameter ([parm]) not valid for External Field ([field]). Valid External Parameters for this field are: [valid parms]External Parameter must be valid for External Field.External Parameter ([parm]) not valid for External Field ([field]). Valid External Parameters for this field are: [valid parms]API Docs
Operation_LevelField Override is not allowed for this Document Field (and Stack level within Document).Field Override is not allowed for this Document Field (and Stack level within Document).API Docs
Integration_Document_Option_Value_ReferenceIntegration Document Option Value must belong to the Integration Document Option defined at Data Initialization Service levelIntegration Document Option Value must belong to the Integration Document Option defined at Data Initialization Service levelAPI Docs
Reference_ID_TypeReference Id Type is not valid for the External Field ReferenceVerify the Reference ID exists in Workday and use the correct type and value.API Docs
Reference_ID_TypeField Data Type Reference must be Instances in order to identify a Reference Id TypeField Data Type Reference must be Instances in order to identify a Reference Id TypeAPI Docs
External_Field_Reference [Choice]External Field must return a Business Object that contains a Reference ID Type in order to be used as an override on a Data Initialization Service or within a Document Builder. Without a Reference ID Type, the resulting value can not be serialized into web service XML.Review Integration System configuration and ensure all required components are defined.API Docs
Loop_On_Order_External_Field_ReferenceLoop On Order External Field only valid when also using Loops On External Field.Loop On Order External Field only valid when also using Loops On External Field.API Docs
DescendingDescending only valid when also using Loop On Order External Field.Descending only valid when also using Loop On Order External Field.API Docs
Operation_LevelExtended Field Override is not allowed for this Document.Extended Field Override is not allowed for this Document.API Docs
Operation_LevelExtended Field Override is allowed for this Document. However, Sub-Documents are not allowed - only Fields.Extended Field Override is allowed for this Document. However, Sub-Documents are not allowed - only Fields.API Docs
Required_FieldField may only be denoted as "Required" if the Field Attributes Service allows for this option and "Include in Output" is TRUE.Field may only be denoted as "Required" if the Field Attributes Service allows for this option and "Include in Output" is TRUE.Provide a non-empty value for this required field.API Docs

Integration_Transport_Protocol_Assignment_DataIf Transport Protocol is a Workday Attachment, then Document Retention Policy is required on the Integration File Utility Data.If Transport Protocol is a Workday Attachment, then Document Retention Policy is required on the Integration File Utility Data.Provide a non-empty value for this required field.API Docs
Integration_Transport_Protocol_Assignment_DataPreview Only cannot be used with Production or empty environments.Preview Only cannot be used with Production or empty environments.Ensure "Preview Only" is not "used with Production or empty environments" — this combination is restricted.API Docs

Check the field name and supply a valid entry.API Docs

Check the field name and supply a valid entry.API Docs

Operation_LevelMultiple delivery methods have conflicting Restricted To and Preview configurations. Multiple delivery methods are configured without any Restricted To and/or Preview Only options.Resolve conflicting "delivery methods" entries. Ensure each configuration is unique with no overlapping or contradictory settings.API Docs
Operation_LevelMultiple delivery methods have conflicting Restricted To and Preview Only configurations. Delivery methods cannot be restricted to the same environment unless they have different Preview Only configurations.Remove extra entries — only one value is allowed for this field.API Docs
Integration_Transport_Protocol_DataIf a value for ID is not provided, or the ID does not represent an existing Transport Protocol, then 1 of the Transport Protocol Data sub-elements is required.If a value for ID is not provided, or the ID does not represent an existing Transport Protocol, then 1 of the Transport Protocol Data sub-elements is required.Include a non-empty value for "If a value for ID is not provided, or the ID does not represent an existing Transport Protocol, then 1 of the Transport Protocol Data sub-elements" in the request.API Docs

Note that only one email address is allowed.Email addresses entered must be in a correct format.Verify that "email address entered. Email addresses must be in the format of 'xxx@yy.com'. Valid examples: john.doe@example.com, jane@example.com. Note that only one email address is allowed" exists in Workday and supply the correct Reference ID (type + value) in the request.API Docs

Get_References

Read Integrations • v46.0 6 validations 1KB req / 1KB resp
POSTPOST https://{tenant}.workday.com/ccx/service/{tenant}/Integrations/v46.0
📌 API Version: Updates Request & Response  ·  Sourced from Workday XSD v30.0–v46.0
6Validations
0Request Fields
0Response Fields
Read SOAP Op
📖 Description

This operation provide a list of values for a business object in Workday given its "Reference ID Type". The "Reference ID Type" for each referenced business object can be retrieved within our API Documentation. For example, the "Reference ID Type" for a Location reference is "Location_ID". So, if we call "Get References" with "Location_ID" you will get back the list of all locations (and their Workday and Reference IDs).

🔐 Contextual Security 🔓 No

This operation does not apply Contextual Security. The ISU sees all data it has general security access to.

🔗 Endpoint
POST POST https://{tenant}.workday.com/ccx/service/{tenant}/Integrations/v46.0
🌐 REST API
No direct REST equivalent found across: connect v2, businessProcess v1, common v1.
This SOAP operation may be SOAP-only, or the resource uses a different naming convention in the REST API.
⚠ No version-specific field data for this operation — version change updates the version string in the SOAP header
SOAP Request — Get_References
v46.0
⚠ No version-specific field data for this operation — version change updates the version string in the SOAP header
SOAP Response — Get_References
v46.0

References_Request_ReferencesTypeRequest References not currently supported for Get References.Request References not currently supported for Get References.API Docs
Reference_ID_TypeNot a valid Reference ID Type.Verify the Reference ID exists in Workday and use the correct type and value.API Docs
Operation_LevelPage Number cannot be zero.Page number cannot be zero.Set Page_Number to 1 or higher in the Response_Filter.API Docs
Reference_ID_TypeUpdate not supported for this Reference ID Type.Update not supported for this Reference ID Type.API Docs

Get_Sequence_Generators

Read Integrations • v46.0 2 validations 1KB req / 3KB resp
POSTPOST https://{tenant}.workday.com/ccx/service/{tenant}/Integrations/v46.0
📌 API Version: Updates Request & Response  ·  Sourced from Workday XSD v30.0–v46.0
2Validations
0Request Fields
3Response Fields
Read SOAP Op
📖 Description

This operation will retrieve data related to a Sequence Generator (e.g ID Definition). Data associated to a Sequence Generator includes the formatting, syntax, last date used, increment value, etc. Sequence Generators are typically associated with Integrations utilizing a Sequence Generator Service.

🔐 Contextual Security 🔓 No

This operation does not apply Contextual Security. The ISU sees all data it has general security access to.

🔗 Endpoint
POST POST https://{tenant}.workday.com/ccx/service/{tenant}/Integrations/v46.0
🌐 REST API
No direct REST equivalent found across: connect v2, businessProcess v1, common v1.
This SOAP operation may be SOAP-only, or the resource uses a different naming convention in the REST API.
⚠ No version-specific field data for this operation — version change updates the version string in the SOAP header

v46.0

Get_Subscriptions

Read Integrations • v46.0 37 validations 1KB req / 10KB resp
POSTPOST https://{tenant}.workday.com/ccx/service/{tenant}/Integrations/v46.0
📌 API Version: Updates Request & Response  ·  Sourced from Workday XSD v30.0–v46.0
37Validations
0Request Fields
12Response Fields
Read SOAP Op
📖 Description

This operation will retrieve data related to Subscriptions, both for an Integration System and for Transaction Log service configuration. A Subscription includes an association with 1 or more Transaction/Business Process Types.

🔐 Contextual Security 🔓 No

This operation does not apply Contextual Security. The ISU sees all data it has general security access to.

🔗 Endpoint
POST POST https://{tenant}.workday.com/ccx/service/{tenant}/Integrations/v46.0
🌐 REST API
No direct REST equivalent found across: connect v2, businessProcess v1, common v1.
This SOAP operation may be SOAP-only, or the resource uses a different naming convention in the REST API.
⚠ No version-specific field data for this operation — version change updates the version string in the SOAP header

v46.0

Subscription_DataEndpoints cannot be defined for this Subscriber. Endpoints can only be defined for Subscribers of type Integration System, because Push Subscription is only supported for Integration System.Review the Integration System configuration. Ensure the correct template type is selected and all required components are defined.API Docs
Subscription_DataA Subscription can not have multiple Endpoints that use the same OMS EnvironmentA Subscription can not have multiple Endpoints that use the same OMS EnvironmentAPI Docs
Subscription_DataA Subscription cannot use 'Subscribe to all Transaction Types' and define Endpoints for Push Subscriptions at the same time. Push Subscriptions are only allowed for Transaction Types that are Business Processes or Event Lites, but not Reorganization Activities.A Subscription cannot use 'Subscribe to all Transaction Types' and define Endpoints for Push Subscriptions at the same time. Approve_Business_Process

Write Integrations • v46.0 2 validations 1KB req / 0KB resp
POSTPOST https://{tenant}.workday.com/ccx/service/{tenant}/Integrations/v46.0
📌 API Version: Updates Request & Response  ·  Sourced from Workday XSD v30.0–v46.0
2Validations
0Request Fields
0Response Fields
Write SOAP Op
📖 Description

This operation approves a business process, if approvable, by the user. If Disable Comment is configured in the coressponding Business Process Policy, comments provided in the request would not be saved.

🔐 Contextual Security — Not Applicable

Contextual Security does not apply to this operation (typically because it is a configuration/reference data operation).

🔗 Endpoint
POST POST https://{tenant}.workday.com/ccx/service/{tenant}/Integrations/v46.0
🌐 REST API Equivalent   businessProcess v1 common v1
/eventSteps/{ID}/approve[businessProcess v1]POSTApproves a business process event step.
/businessTitleChanges/{ID}[common v1]GETRetrieves a business title change instance.
/workers/{ID}/businessTitleChanges[common v1]GETPOSTRetrieves a collection of business title changes for a specific worker.
/workers/{ID}/businessTitleChanges?type=me[common v1]POST
/workers/{ID}/businessTitleChanges/{subresourceID}[common v1]GETRetrieves a business title change instance for a specific worker.
⚠ No version-specific field data for this operation — version change updates the version string in the SOAP header
SOAP Request — Approve_Business_Process
v46.0
⚠ No version-specific field data for this operation — version change updates the version string in the SOAP header
SOAP Response — Approve_Business_Process
v46.0

Field / ElementOfficial Error Message (Workday API Docs)Description🔧 Fix / How to ResolveSource
Approve_Business_Process_RequestTypeSpecify a comment. A value is required.Specify a comment. A value is required.API Docs
CommentThis Business Process has been configured to disable comment. Please remove the comment or change the setting in the Business Process Policy or tenant setup.Review Business Process configuration to ensure this action is enabled and properly set up.API Docs

v1.0AddedOperation introduced.

Cancel_Business_Process

Write Integrations • v46.0 4 validations 1KB req / 0KB resp

📌 API Version: Updates Request & Response  ·  Sourced from Workday XSD v30.0–v46.0
4Validations
0Request Fields
0Response Fields
Write SOAP Op
📖 Description

This operation cancels a business process, if cancelable, by the user

🔐 Contextual Security — Not Applicable

Contextual Security does not apply to this operation (typically because it is a configuration/reference data operation).

🔗 Endpoint
POST POST https://{tenant}.workday.com/ccx/service/{tenant}/Integrations/v46.0
🌐 REST API Equivalent   common v1

/workers/{ID}/businessTitleChanges?type=me[common v1]POST
/workers/{ID}/businessTitleChanges/{subresourceID}[common v1]GETRetrieves a business title change instance for a specific worker.

Event_ReferenceBusiness Process awaiting participation step cannot be canceled via Web Service, use Mass Cancel Business Processes task or Cancel related action off of the Event.This action (canceled) cannot be performed via the Web Services API. Complete the action manually in the Workday UI instead.API Docs
Event_ReferenceBusiness Process cannot be canceled via Web Service.The provided event cannot be canceled via Web Service.This action (canceled) cannot be performed via the Web Services API. Complete the action manually in the Workday UI instead.API Docs
Cancel_Business_Process_DataThe field Comment is required and must have a value.Include a non-empty value for "Comment" in the request.API Docs

Cancel_Integration_Event

Write Integrations • v46.0 3 validations 0KB req / 0KB resp
POSTPOST https://{tenant}.workday.com/ccx/service/{tenant}/Integrations/v46.0
📌 API Version: Updates Request & Response  ·  Sourced from Workday XSD v30.0–v46.0
3Validations
2Request Fields
2Response Fields
Write SOAP Op
📖 Description

This operation will cancel an event

🔐 Contextual Security 🔒 Yes

This operation is context-restricted. The ISU must be granted Contextual Security access to the relevant business objects (e.g., specific orgs, positions, or workers). Results may vary per ISU security configuration.

🔗 Endpoint
POST POST https://{tenant}.workday.com/ccx/service/{tenant}/Integrations/v46.0
🌐 REST API Equivalent   businessProcess v1
/events[businessProcess v1]GETRetrieves business process events.
/eventSteps[businessProcess v1]GETRetrieves business process event steps.
/events/{ID}[businessProcess v1]GETRetrieves a business process event.
/eventSteps/{ID}[businessProcess v1]GETRetrieves a business process event step.
/events/{ID}/cancel[businessProcess v1]POSTCancels a business process event.
/events/{ID}/rescind[businessProcess v1]POSTRescinds a business process event.
/eventSteps/{ID}/toDo[businessProcess v1]POSTPost an action for a To Do step in a business process.
/events/{ID}/comments[businessProcess v1]GETRetrieves comments for a business process event.
/eventSteps/{ID}/deny[businessProcess v1]POSTDenies a business process event step.
/events/{ID}/attachments[businessProcess v1]GETRetrieves attachments for a business process event.

v46.0

Delete_Integration_System

Write Integrations • v46.0 4 validations 0KB req / 0KB resp
POSTPOST https://{tenant}.workday.com/ccx/service/{tenant}/Integrations/v46.0
📌 API Version: Updates Request & Response  ·  Sourced from Workday XSD v30.0–v46.0
4Validations
2Request Fields
2Response Fields
Write SOAP Op
📖 Description

This operation will delete an Integration System. Data returned within the response includes any response message related to the delete, including error messaging.

🔐 Contextual Security 🔒 Yes

This operation is context-restricted. The ISU must be granted Contextual Security access to the relevant business objects (e.g., specific orgs, positions, or workers). Results may vary per ISU security configuration.

🔗 Endpoint
POST POST https://{tenant}.workday.com/ccx/service/{tenant}/Integrations/v46.0

Write SOAP Op
📖 Description

This operation denies a business process, if deniable, by the user

🔐 Contextual Security — Not Applicable

Contextual Security does not apply to this operation (typically because it is a configuration/reference data operation).

🔗 Endpoint
POST POST https://{tenant}.workday.com/ccx/service/{tenant}/Integrations/v46.0
🌐 REST API Equivalent   businessProcess v1 common v1
/eventSteps/{ID}/deny[businessProcess v1]POSTDenies a business process event step.
/businessTitleChanges/{ID}[common v1]GETRetrieves a business title change instance.
/workers/{ID}/businessTitleChanges[common v1]GETPOSTRetrieves a collection of business title changes for a specific worker.
/workers/{ID}/businessTitleChanges?type=me[common v1]POST
/workers/{ID}/businessTitleChanges/{subresourceID}[common v1]GETRetrieves a business title change instance for a specific worker.
⚠ No version-specific field data for this operation — version change updates the version string in the SOAP header
SOAP Request — Deny_Business_Process
v46.0
⚠ No version-specific field data for this operation — version change updates the version string in the SOAP header
SOAP Response — Deny_Business_Process
v46.0
✓ Data Source: Official Workday API Docs  —  4 validation messages scraped directly from the Workday Community Operation Details page for this operation. These are the exact runtime error messages Workday returns.  🔧 4 Fix suggestions
4 validations
Field / ElementOfficial Error Message (Workday API Docs)Description🔧 Fix / How to ResolveSource
Event_ReferenceBusiness Process cannot be Denied via Web Service.Business Process cannot be Denied via Web Service.This action (Denied) cannot be performed via the Web Services API. Complete the action manually in the Workday UI instead.API Docs
Event_ReferenceThis task has been delegated to another user and cannot be Denied.This task has been delegated to another user and cannot be Denied.Ensure "This task has been delegated to another user and" is not "Denied" — this combination is restricted.API Docs
Operation_LevelThe field Comment is required and must have a value.Include a non-empty value for "Comment" in the request.API Docs
CommentThis Business Process has been configured to disable comment. Please remove the comment or change the setting in the Business Process Policy or tenant setup.Review Business Process configuration to ensure this action is enabled and properly set up.API Docs

12Validations

Write SOAP Op

🔗 Endpoint
POST POST https://{tenant}.workday.com/ccx/service/{tenant}/Integrations/v46.0
🌐 REST API
No direct REST equivalent found across: connect v2, businessProcess v1, common v1.
This SOAP operation may be SOAP-only, or the resource uses a different naming convention in the REST API.
⚠ No version-specific field data for this operation — version change updates the version string in the SOAP header
SOAP Request — Include_Reference_Descriptors_In
v46.0
⚠ No version-specific field data for this operation — version change updates the version string in the SOAP header
SOAP Response — Include_Reference_Descriptors_In
v46.0
ℹ Data Source  —  Field names are cross-verified against the Workday XSD schema (v30.0–v46.0). Error messages describe common SOAP API runtime behaviors.
12 validations
Field / ElementError MessageWhen This OccursResolution / Fix
Integration_System_ReferenceIntegration System does not exist or is not accessible.The provided Integration_System_Reference WID does not match any integration system.Use the Workday UI to locate the correct integration system WID.
Launch_Parameter_Data / NameLaunch Parameter name is not defined for this integration system.A launch parameter name provided does not exist in the integration system definition.Check the integration system's defined launch parameters in Workday and use exact names.
XSLT_File / FileXSLT document is not well-formed XML.The XSLT transformation file contains invalid XML syntax.Validate the XSLT document with an XML validator before encoding to base64.
Document_Field_Override_DataField override not valid for the specified integration template.Document field override references a field that doesn't exist in the integration template.Check the integration template definition for valid field names before adding overrides.
Business_Process_Parameters / CommentThis Business Process has been configured to disable comment.Comment_Data submitted but BP Policy has comments disabled.Remove Comment_Data from the request, or enable comments in the Business Process Policy.
Business_Process_Parameters / Auto_CompleteThe Automatically Complete flag is not allowed by the business process policy.Auto_Complete=true but tenant BP Policy prohibits automatic completion.Set Auto_Complete=false, or update the Business Process Policy to allow auto-complete.
Business_Process_Parameters / Discard_On_Exit_Validation_ErrorDiscard_On_Exit_Validation_Error is set to true but no validation errors are eligible.Flag is true for a BP that has no configured exit validations.Set Discard_On_Exit_Validation_Error=false, or configure exit validations in the BP.
WID / Reference IDInvalid ID value. The referenced object does not exist or is not accessible.Any WID or Reference ID in the payload points to a non-existent or inaccessible object.Validate all WIDs/Reference IDs via the corresponding Get operation before submitting.
Organization_ReferenceYou do not have security access to the organization.Integration System User's security group lacks access to the referenced organization.Add the required Organization Segment security group to the ISU's security profile.
Currency_ReferenceCurrency is required because an amount was entered.An Amount field is populated without a corresponding Currency_Reference.Always pair Currency_Reference with any monetary Amount field.
@versionThe version specified is not supported.bsvc:version attribute is set to an unknown version string.Set bsvc:version='v46.0' or use the latest supported version.
Business_Process_ParametersYou do not have permission to initiate the business process.ISU lacks the required domain security policy or business process security policy permission.Grant the ISU the required domain security policy (e.g., Initiate, Process).
ℹ Data Source  —  Changelog entries are auto-generated from a recursive XSD type-tree diff across Workday API versions v30.0–v46.0. Each entry records the first version a field appeared in the schema.
VersionTypeDescription
v46.0ChangedRefer to Workday Community release notes for Include_Reference_Descriptors_In version history.
v1.0AddedOperation introduced.

Increment_Sequence_Generator

Write Integrations • v46.0 2 validations 0KB req / 0KB resp
POSTPOST https://{tenant}.workday.com/ccx/service/{tenant}/Integrations/v46.0
📌 API Version: Updates Request & Response  ·  Sourced from Workday XSD v30.0–v46.0
2Validations
0Request Fields
0Response Fields
Write SOAP Op
📖 Description

This operation will increments a Sequence Generator and persists the data within Workday. The response is the fully formatted value of the Sequence Generator after the increment.

🔐 Contextual Security 🔓 No

This operation does not apply Contextual Security. The ISU sees all data it has general security access to.

🔗 Endpoint
POST POST https://{tenant}.workday.com/ccx/service/{tenant}/Integrations/v46.0

Launch_EIB

Write Integrations • v46.0 13 validations 2KB req / 6KB resp
POSTPOST https://{tenant}.workday.com/ccx/service/{tenant}/Integrations/v46.0
📌 API Version: Updates Request & Response  ·  Sourced from Workday XSD v30.0–v46.0
13Validations
0Request Fields
0Response Fields
Write SOAP Op
📖 Description

This operation will Launch an EIB Integration. The request has the ability to accept override Runtime Parameters that should be used within the integration processing. If no override is provided within the request, the System Default, which has been defined on the EIB Definition, will be used. The result of this operation will be the creation of an Integration Event along with the processing of the integration itself.

🔐 Contextual Security 🔒 Yes

This operation is context-restricted. The ISU must be granted Contextual Security access to the relevant business objects (e.g., specific orgs, positions, or workers). Results may vary per ISU security configuration.

🔗 Endpoint
POST POST https://{tenant}.workday.com/ccx/service/{tenant}/Integrations/v46.0
🌐 REST API
No direct REST equivalent found across: connect v2, businessProcess v1, common v1.
This SOAP operation may be SOAP-only, or the resource uses a different naming convention in the REST API.
⚠ No version-specific field data for this operation — version change updates the version string in the SOAP header
SOAP Request — Launch_EIB
v46.0
⚠ No version-specific field data for this operation — version change updates the version string in the SOAP header
SOAP Response — Launch_EIB
v46.0
✓ Data Source: Official Workday API Docs  —  13 validation messages scraped directly from the Workday Community Operation Details page for this operation. These are the exact runtime error messages Workday returns.  🔧 13 Fix suggestions
13 validations
Field / ElementOfficial Error Message (Workday API Docs)Description🔧 Fix / How to ResolveSource
Launch_EIB_RequestTypeThe current System User does not have access to Launch this Integration System.The current System User should have access to Launch the EIB Integration System. If there are any Report Data Sources and/or Web Service Transports within the EIB definition, then the System User needs security access to those as well.The current ISU or user lacks the required security group access. Grant the appropriate security group membership in Workday security configuration.API Docs
Field_Override_DataUse the Next Sequence for Integration File Utility field for File Name when launching or scheduling the EIB.Use the Next Sequence for Integration File Utility field for File Name when launching or scheduling the EIB.API Docs
Field_NameThe Field Name "[field]" is not valid for [int system] and this section of the Launch EIB request. Valid Fields for [section] section are: [field labels]Field Name must be valid for EIB and this section (e.g. Data Source, Transformation, File Utility, Transport Protocol) of the Launch EIB request.Verify the EIB integration system configuration: ensure it has a valid Data Source, Transport Protocol, and Transformation set for the current environment.API Docs
Field_NameThe Override Field "[field]", whose return type is "[work data att][work data inst][enum class]", expects the appropriate attribute/instance element to be populated within the Field Override Data subelement.The Override Field expects the appropriate attribute/instance element to be populated within the Field Override Data subelement.The Override Field "[field]", whose return type is "[work data att][work data inst][enum class]", expects the appropriate attribute/instance element to be populated within the Field Override Data subelement.API Docs
Field_NameAttachment Data subelement is only allowed within the request when the Override Field accepts an Integration Attachment (e.g. within a Data Source service component).Attachment Data subelement is only allowed within the request when the Override Field accepts an Integration Attachment (e.g. within a Data Source service component).Attachment Data subelement is only allowed within the request when the Override Field accepts an Integration Attachment (e.g. within a Data Source service component).API Docs
Field_NameThe Override Field "[field]", whose return type is "[work data att][work data inst]", expects the appropriate return type from the External Field Reference. The External Field "[ext field]" returns a data type of "[ext field data type att][ext field data type inst]" instead.External Field reference must return a data type that is comparable to the Override Field's data type.The Override Field "[field]", whose return type is "[work data att][work data inst]", expects the appropriate return type from the External Field Reference. The External Field "[ext field]" returns a data type of "[ext field data type att][ext field data type inst]" instead.API Docs
Field_NameThe External Field reference "[ext field]" is valid for the "[bus object]" business object. It must be executable off of the Integration System business object, or it must be a Global, static field. Also, it must be accessible by the processing user.External Field reference must be executable off of the Integration System business object, or it must be a Global, static field. Also, it must be accessible by the processing user.Review the Integration System configuration. Ensure the correct template type is selected and all required components are defined.API Docs
Operation_LevelUse the Next Sequence for Integration File Utility field for File Name when launching or scheduling the EIB.Use the Next Sequence for Integration File Utility field for File Name when launching or scheduling the EIB.API Docs
Integration_System_ReferenceIntegration Event must be valid for Integration System if both are provided.Integration Event must be valid for Integration System if both are provided.Review the Integration System configuration. Ensure the correct template type is selected and all required components are defined.API Docs
Integration_System_ReferenceIntegration System is required when creating an instance of Integration Event.Integration System is required when creating an instance of Integration Event.Review the Integration System configuration. Ensure the correct template type is selected and all required components are defined.API Docs
Process_DescriptionProcess Description is required when creating an instance of Integration Event.Process Description is required when creating an instance of Integration Event.Provide a non-empty value for this required field.API Docs
Percent_CompletePercent Complete is only allowed to be updated through a web service request when the corresponding Integration Template allows for this.Percent Complete is only allowed to be updated through a web service request when the corresponding Integration Template allows for this.Review the Integration System configuration. Ensure the correct template type is selected and all required components are defined.API Docs
Percent_Complete% Complete cannot be greater than 100%.% Complete cannot be greater than 100%.Set Percent_Complete to a value between 0 and 100.API Docs
ℹ Data Source  —  Changelog entries are auto-generated from a recursive XSD type-tree diff across Workday API versions v30.0–v46.0. Each entry records the first version a field appeared in the schema.
VersionTypeDescription

v1.0AddedOperation introduced.

Integration_Launch_Parameter_Data / Launch_Parameter_ReferenceRequired element 'Launch_Parameter_Reference' is missing.The 'Launch_Parameter_Reference' element is absent from the request body.minOccurs=1 (required element — XSD default)[COMMENT] Always include <bsvc:Launch_Parameter_Reference>...</bsvc:Launch_Parameter_Reference> in your SOAP request. This element is mandatory per the XSD schema.
Integration_Launch_Parameter_Data / Launch_Parameter_ReferenceInvalid or not-found reference for 'Launch_Parameter_Reference'.The ID value supplied in 'Launch_Parameter_Reference' does not match any active record of type 'Launch_ParameterObjectType' in the tenant.type=wd:Launch_ParameterObjectType (Workday ObjectType — reference lookup)[COMMENT] Verify the reference ID exists by running the corresponding Get_ operation first. Ensure the ID type attribute matches the expected reference type (e.g. bsvc:type="Launch_Parameter_ID").
Integration_Launch_Parameter_Data / Launch_Parameter_Value_Data / DateInvalid date format for 'Date'.The value supplied is not a valid xs:date string.type=xs:date (XSD date/time primitive)[COMMENT] Provide date in {'YYYY-MM-DD' if fmt == 'date' else 'YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ'} format (ISO 8601). Example: 2024-06-15.
Integration_Launch_Parameter_Data / Launch_Parameter_Value_Data / DateTimeInvalid date format for 'DateTime'.The value supplied is not a valid xs:dateTime string.type=xs:dateTime (XSD date/time primitive)[COMMENT] Provide date in {'YYYY-MM-DD' if fmt == 'date' else 'YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ'} format (ISO 8601). Example: 2024-06-15T09:00:00Z.
Integration_Launch_Parameter_Data / Launch_Parameter_Value_Data / BooleanInvalid boolean value for 'Boolean'.Value is not 'true' or 'false' (case-sensitive in strict XML).type=xsd:boolean (XSD boolean primitive)[COMMENT] Use lowercase 'true' or 'false'. Workday also accepts '1' (true) and '0' (false) for xs:boolean.
Integration_Launch_Parameter_Data / Launch_Parameter_Value_Data / Instance_ReferenceInvalid or not-found reference for 'Instance_Reference'.The ID value supplied in 'Instance_Reference' does not match any active record of type 'InstanceObjectType' in the tenant.type=wd:InstanceObjectType (Workday ObjectType — reference lookup)[COMMENT] Verify the reference ID exists by running the corresponding Get_ operation first. Ensure the ID type attribute matches the expected reference type (e.g. bsvc:type="Instance_ID").

Ensure the ID type attribute matches the expected reference type (e.g. bsvc:type="Mime_Type_ID").

Ensure the ID type attribute matches the expected reference type (e.g. bsvc:type="Document_Type_ID").
Listener_Document_Data / Expiration_TimestampRequired element 'Expiration_Timestamp' is missing.The 'Expiration_Timestamp' element is absent from the request body.minOccurs=1 (required element — XSD default)[COMMENT] Always include <bsvc:Expiration_Timestamp>...</bsvc:Expiration_Timestamp> in your SOAP request. Example: 2024-06-15T09:00:00Z.

Put_Business_Process_Delegation

Write Integrations • v46.0 50 validations 2KB req / 0KB resp
POSTPOST https://{tenant}.workday.com/ccx/service/{tenant}/Integrations/v46.0
📌 API Version: Updates Request & Response  ·  Sourced from Workday XSD v30.0–v46.0
50Validations
16Request Fields
7Response Fields
Write SOAP Op
📖 Description

Creates or updates delegations for a given Worker

🔐 Contextual Security 🔓 No

This operation does not apply Contextual Security. The ISU sees all data it has general security access to.

🔗 Endpoint
POST POST https://{tenant}.workday.com/ccx/service/{tenant}/Integrations/v46.0
🌐 REST API Equivalent   common v1
/businessTitleChanges/{ID}[common v1]GETRetrieves a business title change instance.
/workers/{ID}/businessTitleChanges[common v1]GETPOSTRetrieves a collection of business title changes for a specific worker.
/workers/{ID}/businessTitleChanges?type=me[common v1]POST
/workers/{ID}/businessTitleChanges/{subresourceID}[common v1]GETRetrieves a business title change instance for a specific worker.
SOAP Request — Put_Business_Process_Delegation23 version-gated fields
v46.0
SOAP Response — Put_Business_Process_Delegation
v46.0
✓ Data Source: Official Workday API Docs  —  50 validation messages scraped directly from the Workday Community Operation Details page for this operation. These are the exact runtime error messages Workday returns.  🔧 50 Fix suggestions
50 validations
Field / ElementOfficial Error Message (Workday API Docs)Description🔧 Fix / How to ResolveSource
Current_Delegation_DataThis request removes all current delegations for [worker]. To remove all delegations, specify Stop All Delegations.This request removes all current delegations for <worker>. To remove all delegations, specify Stop All Delegations.Provide the required value as described. Check the field name and supply a valid entry.API Docs
Current_Delegation_DataYou can only set up delegations for individuals with a worker role.You can only set up delegations for individuals with a worker role.Supply a valid Worker_Reference. The worker must be active (or pre-hire) and accessible to the processing user.API Docs
Current_Delegation_DataSpecify a valid worker as the delegator for this delegation request. Example: A terminated worker isn't a valid worker and can't be a delegator.Specify a valid worker as the delegator for this delegation request. Example: A terminated worker isn't a valid worker and can't be a delegator.Specify a valid worker as the delegator for this delegation request. Example: A terminated worker isn't a valid worker and can't be a delegator.API Docs
Response_FilterPage Number cannot be zero.Page number cannot be zero.Set Page_Number to 1 or higher in the Response_Filter.API Docs
Business_Process_Delegation_Data [Choice]Delegation Begin Date is required and must have a valueDelegation Begin Date is required and must have a valueInclude a non-empty value for "Delegation Begin Date" in the request.API Docs
Business_Process_Delegation_Data [Choice]Specify an end date that's greater than or equal to this begin date: [bd].Specify an end date that's greater than or equal to the begin date.Specify an end date that's greater than or equal to this begin date: [bd].API Docs
Business_Process_Delegation_Data [Choice]You can't select a specific business process and also select all business processes to delegate at the same time. Specify either For all Business Processes option or For Business Process option and the business processes you want to delegate.You can't select a specific business process and also select all business processes to delegate at the same time. Specify either For all Business Processes option or For Business Process option and the business processes you want to delegate.Review delegation setup: ensure the delegator has a worker role, the delegate is active, and the relevant Business Process is enabled for delegation in BP configuration.API Docs
Business_Process_Delegation_Data [Choice]Specify the delegation end date.Specify the delegation end date.Specify the delegation end date.API Docs
Business_Process_Delegation_Data [Choice]Specify business processes to delegate.Specify business processes to delegate.Specify business processes to delegate.API Docs
Business_Process_Delegation_Data [Choice]To delegate a business process, you must enable the Allow Business Process Delegation field on the business process security policy.To delegate a business process, you must enable the Allow Business Process Delegation field on the business process security policy.The current ISU or user lacks the required security group access. Grant the appropriate security group membership in Workday security configuration.API Docs
Business_Process_Delegation_Data [Choice]Specify valid delegation rules for the business processes. When you specify For all Business Processes and also specify delegation rules, the rules must be valid for all business processes.Specify valid delegation rules for the business processes. When you specify For all Business Processes and also specify delegation rules, the rules must be valid for all business processes.Specify valid delegation rules for the business processes. When you specify For all Business Processes and also specify delegation rules, the rules must be valid for all business processes.API Docs
Business_Process_Delegation_Data [Choice]Delegate is required and must have a valueDelegate is required and must have a valueInclude a non-empty value for "Delegate" in the request.API Docs
Business_Process_Delegation_Data [Choice]You can't make changes to a business process delegation that's not active for the specified delegator.You can't make changes to a business process delegation that's not active for the specified delegator.Review delegation setup: ensure the delegator has a worker role, the delegate is active, and the relevant Business Process is enabled for delegation in BP configuration.API Docs
Business_Process_Delegation_Data [Choice]There's a pending delegation change for the delegator. Until the change is approved, you can't create a new delegation or update an existing delegation for this delegator.There's a pending delegation change for the delegator. Until the change is approved, you can't create a new delegation or update an existing delegation for this delegator.Review delegation setup: ensure the delegator has a worker role, the delegate is active, and the relevant Business Process is enabled for delegation in BP configuration.API Docs
Business_Process_Delegation_Data [Choice]To remove a delegation, you must specify a valid reference ID.To remove a delegation, you must specify a valid reference ID.Review delegation setup: ensure the delegator has a worker role, the delegate is active, and the relevant Business Process is enabled for delegation in BP configuration.API Docs
Business_Process_Delegation_Data [Choice]Specify a valid delegation reference ID that doesn't contain HIST or PEND in the ID.Specify a valid delegation reference ID that doesn't contain HIST or PEND in the ID.Specify a valid delegation reference ID that doesn't contain HIST or PEND in the ID.API Docs
Business_Process_Delegation_Data [Choice]You can't submit multiple delegation rows for the same delegation reference ID.You can't submit multiple delegation rows for the same delegation reference ID.Review delegation setup: ensure the delegator has a worker role, the delegate is active, and the relevant Business Process is enabled for delegation in BP configuration.API Docs
Business_Process_Delegation_Data [Choice]You can't specify an Alternate Delegate because you didn't enable the Apply Routing Restrictions during Delegation field on the tenant setup for business processes.You can't specify an Alternate Delegate because you didn't enable the Apply Routing Restrictions during Delegation field on the tenant setup for business processes.Review delegation setup: ensure the delegator has a worker role, the delegate is active, and the relevant Business Process is enabled for delegation in BP configuration.API Docs
Business_Process_Delegation_Data [Choice]Specify a valid Alternate Delegate.Specify a valid Alternate Delegate.Specify a valid Alternate Delegate.API Docs
Business_Process_Delegation_Data [Choice]Specify a value for Alternate Delegate that isn't the delegate or delegator.Specify a value for Alternate Delegate that isn't the delegate or delegator.Specify a value for Alternate Delegate that isn't the delegate or delegator.API Docs
Business_Process_Delegation_Data [Choice]Specify a valid worker as the delegate for this delegation request. Examples: A terminated worker can't be a delegate. The delegator and delegate for the delegation request can't be the same worker. You can only specify a delegate that's determined by the Users Can Delegate Tasks To prompt configuration on the Edit Tenant Setup - Business Process task.Specify a valid worker as the delegate for this delegation request. Examples: A terminated worker can't be a delegate. The delegator and delegate for the delegation request can't be the same worker. You can only specify a delegate that's determined by the Users Can Delegate Tasks To prompt configuration on the Edit Tenant Setup - Business Process task.Specify a valid worker as the delegate for this delegation request. Examples: A terminated worker can't be a delegate. The delegator and delegate for the delegation request can't be the same worker. You can only specify a delegate that's determined by the Users Can Delegate Tasks To prompt configuration on the Edit Tenant Setup - Business Process task.API Docs
Business_Process_Delegation_Data [Choice]You can only specify initiating actions that the delegator has security access to delegate. The delegator must be part of a security group on the business process security policy.You can only specify initiating actions that the delegator has security access to delegate. The delegator must be part of a security group on the business process security policy.The current ISU or user lacks the required security group access. Grant the appropriate security group membership in Workday security configuration.API Docs
Business_Process_Delegation_Data [Choice]You can only specify a person with a worker role as a delegate for this delegation request.You can only specify a person with a worker role as a delegate for this delegation request.Review delegation setup: ensure the delegator has a worker role, the delegate is active, and the relevant Business Process is enabled for delegation in BP configuration.API Docs
Business_Process_Delegation_Data [Choice]You can only specify a person with a worker role as an alternate delegate for this delegation request.You can only specify a person with a worker role as an alternate delegate for this delegation request.Review delegation setup: ensure the delegator has a worker role, the delegate is active, and the relevant Business Process is enabled for delegation in BP configuration.API Docs
Business_Process_Delegation_Data [Choice]You can't submit this new delegation configuration because a delegation already exists with identical values for the following fields: Delegator, Begin Date, End Date, Delegate, and Business Process.You can't submit this new delegation configuration because a delegation already exists with identical values for the following fields: Delegator, Begin Date, End Date, Delegate, and Business Process.This entry already exists. Check for duplicates before submitting.API Docs
Operation_LevelThis request removes all current delegations for [worker]. To remove all delegations, specify Stop All Delegations.This request removes all current delegations for <worker>. To remove all delegations, specify Stop All Delegations.Provide the required value as described. Check the field name and supply a valid entry.API Docs
