Put_Hide_Workday_Delivered_Report

Write Integrations • v46.0 1 validations 1KB req / 0KB resp
POSTPOST https://{tenant}.workday.com/ccx/service/{tenant}/Integrations/v46.0
📌 API Version: Updates Request & Response  ·  Sourced from Workday XSD v30.0–v46.0
1Validations
3Request Fields
2Response Fields
Write SOAP Op
📖 Description

Creates or updates hidden Workday delivered reports.

🔐 Contextual Security 🔓 No

This operation does not apply Contextual Security. The ISU sees all data it has general security access to.

🔗 Endpoint
POST POST https://{tenant}.workday.com/ccx/service/{tenant}/Integrations/v46.0
🌐 REST API Equivalent   common v1
/workers/{ID}/directReports[common v1]GETRetrieves a collection of direct reports for a specific worker.
/workers/{ID}/directReports/{subresourceID}[common v1]GETRetrieves a direct report instance for a specific worker.
SOAP Request — Put_Hide_Workday_Delivered_Report5 version-gated fields
v46.0
SOAP Response — Put_Hide_Workday_Delivered_Report
v46.0
✓ Data Source: Official Workday API Docs  —  1 validation messages scraped directly from the Workday Community Operation Details page for this operation. These are the exact runtime error messages Workday returns.  🔧 1 Fix suggestions
1 validations
Field / ElementOfficial Error Message (Workday API Docs)Description🔧 Fix / How to ResolveSource
Workday_Delivered_Report_ReferenceThere are reports that are currently being used in other areas in the system and cannot be hidden. Please review the Report Usage column and remove the reports that are currently used elsewhere in the system.Ensure "There are reports that are currently being used in other areas in the system and" is not "hidden. Please review the Report Usage column and remove the reports that are currently used elsewhere in the system" — this combination is restricted.API Docs
ℹ Data Source  —  Changelog entries are auto-generated from a recursive XSD type-tree diff across Workday API versions v30.0–v46.0. Each entry records the first version a field appeared in the schema.
VersionTypeDescription
v38.0AddedRequest: 1 new field(s) — Hide_Workday_Delivered_Report_Data | Response: 1 new field(s) — Hide_Workday_Delivered_Report_Reference
v1.0AddedOperation introduced.

Put_Integration_Event

Write Integrations • v46.0 5 validations 3KB req / 0KB resp
POSTPOST https://{tenant}.workday.com/ccx/service/{tenant}/Integrations/v46.0
📌 API Version: Updates Request & Response  ·  Sourced from Workday XSD v30.0–v46.0
5Validations
0Request Fields
0Response Fields
Write SOAP Op
📖 Description

This operation will create and/or update data related to an Integration Event. Data included will be Integration System, Launch datetime, Triggering User, Status and Runtime Parameters.

🔐 Contextual Security 🔓 No

This operation does not apply Contextual Security. The ISU sees all data it has general security access to.

🔗 Endpoint
POST POST https://{tenant}.workday.com/ccx/service/{tenant}/Integrations/v46.0
🌐 REST API Equivalent   businessProcess v1
/events[businessProcess v1]GETRetrieves business process events.
/eventSteps[businessProcess v1]GETRetrieves business process event steps.
/events/{ID}[businessProcess v1]GETRetrieves a business process event.
/eventSteps/{ID}[businessProcess v1]GETRetrieves a business process event step.
/events/{ID}/cancel[businessProcess v1]POSTCancels a business process event.
/events/{ID}/rescind[businessProcess v1]POSTRescinds a business process event.
/eventSteps/{ID}/toDo[businessProcess v1]POSTPost an action for a To Do step in a business process.
/events/{ID}/comments[businessProcess v1]GETRetrieves comments for a business process event.
/eventSteps/{ID}/deny[businessProcess v1]POSTDenies a business process event step.
/events/{ID}/attachments[businessProcess v1]GETRetrieves attachments for a business process event.
⚠ No version-specific field data for this operation — version change updates the version string in the SOAP header
SOAP Request — Put_Integration_Event
v46.0
⚠ No version-specific field data for this operation — version change updates the version string in the SOAP header
SOAP Response — Put_Integration_Event
v46.0
✓ Data Source: Official Workday API Docs  —  5 validation messages scraped directly from the Workday Community Operation Details page for this operation. These are the exact runtime error messages Workday returns.  🔧 5 Fix suggestions
5 validations
Field / ElementOfficial Error Message (Workday API Docs)Description🔧 Fix / How to ResolveSource
Integration_System_ReferenceIntegration Event must be valid for Integration System if both are provided.Integration Event must be valid for Integration System if both are provided.Review the Integration System configuration. Ensure the correct template type is selected and all required components are defined.API Docs
Integration_System_ReferenceIntegration System is required when creating an instance of Integration Event.Integration System is required when creating an instance of Integration Event.Review the Integration System configuration. Ensure the correct template type is selected and all required components are defined.API Docs
Process_DescriptionProcess Description is required when creating an instance of Integration Event.Process Description is required when creating an instance of Integration Event.Provide a non-empty value for this required field.API Docs
Percent_CompletePercent Complete is only allowed to be updated through a web service request when the corresponding Integration Template allows for this.Percent Complete is only allowed to be updated through a web service request when the corresponding Integration Template allows for this.Review the Integration System configuration. Ensure the correct template type is selected and all required components are defined.API Docs
Percent_Complete% Complete cannot be greater than 100%.% Complete cannot be greater than 100%.Set Percent_Complete to a value between 0 and 100.API Docs

v1.0AddedOperation introduced.

Put_Integration_Message

Write Integrations • v46.0 4 validations 3KB req / 0KB resp
POSTPOST https://{tenant}.workday.com/ccx/service/{tenant}/Integrations/v46.0
📌 API Version: Updates Request & Response  ·  Sourced from Workday XSD v30.0–v46.0
4Validations
0Request Fields
0Response Fields
Write SOAP Op
📖 Description

This operation adds a message to either an Integration System or Integration Event which allows for status, information and error details to be communicated back to Workday.

🔐 Contextual Security 🔓 No

This operation does not apply Contextual Security. The ISU sees all data it has general security access to.

🔗 Endpoint
POST POST https://{tenant}.workday.com/ccx/service/{tenant}/Integrations/v46.0
🌐 REST API Equivalent   connect v2
/sendMessage[connect v2]POSTsendMessage API
/messageTemplates[connect v2]GETPOSTRetrieves a collection of message templates.
/messageTemplates/{ID}[connect v2]GETPATCHPUTRetrieves a message template with the specific ID.
⚠ No version-specific field data for this operation — version change updates the version string in the SOAP header
SOAP Request — Put_Integration_Message
v46.0
⚠ No version-specific field data for this operation — version change updates the version string in the SOAP header
SOAP Response — Put_Integration_Message
v46.0

4 validations

Integration_Message_DataRepository Document can only be added to an active Integration Event (e.g. Processing status).Repository Document can only be added to an active Integration Event (e.g. Processing status).Repository Document can only be added to an active Integration Event (e.g. Processing status).API Docs
Integration_Event_Reference [Choice]When using Import Integration Message, all Message Data must be associated with an Integration Event that rolls up to the Integration Event on the header.When using Import Integration Message, all Message Data must be associated with an Integration Event that rolls up to the Integration Event on the header.API Docs
Integration_Event_Reference [Choice]When using Import Integration Message, all Message Data must be associated with an Integration Event and not an Integration System.Review the Integration System configuration. Ensure the correct template type is selected and all required components are defined.API Docs
Operation_LevelRepository Document can only be added to an active Integration Event (e.g. Processing status).Repository Document can only be added to an active Integration Event (e.g. Processing status).Repository Document can only be added to an active Integration Event (e.g. Processing status).API Docs

Put_Integration_System

Write Integrations • v46.0 202 validations 76KB req / 0KB resp
POSTPOST https://{tenant}.workday.com/ccx/service/{tenant}/Integrations/v46.0
📌 API Version: Updates Request & Response  ·  Sourced from Workday XSD v30.0–v46.0
202Validations
52Request Fields
0Response Fields
Write SOAP Op
📖 Description

This operation will create and/or update data related to an Integration System. Data returned within the response includes Services associated and enabled, Attribute/Map values, Service configurations and Custom Services Attributes, Maps and Launch Parameters.

🔐 Contextual Security 🔓 No

This operation does not apply Contextual Security. The ISU sees all data it has general security access to.

🔗 Endpoint
POST POST https://{tenant}.workday.com/ccx/service/{tenant}/Integrations/v46.0
🌐 REST API
No direct REST equivalent found across: connect v2, businessProcess v1, common v1.
This SOAP operation may be SOAP-only, or the resource uses a different naming convention in the REST API.
SOAP Request — Put_Integration_System52 version-gated fields
v46.0
⚠ No version-specific field data for this operation — version change updates the version string in the SOAP header
SOAP Response — Put_Integration_System
v46.0

Integration_System_DataOnly 1 Launch Parameter may be marked with each of the "Date" Options: - As Of Effective Date - As Of Entry DateTime - Begin Effective Date - Begin Entry DateTimeRemove duplicates — only one "Launch Parameter" is allowed per request.API Docs

v1.0AddedOperation introduced.

Put_Integration_System_User

Write Integrations • v46.0 13 validations 2KB req / 0KB resp
POSTPOST https://{tenant}.workday.com/ccx/service/{tenant}/Integrations/v46.0
📌 API Version: Updates Request & Response  ·  Sourced from Workday XSD v30.0–v46.0
13Validations
1Request Fields
0Response Fields
Write SOAP Op
📖 Description

This operation will create and/or update data related to Workday Accounts associated to an Integration System.

🔐 Contextual Security 🔓 No

This operation does not apply Contextual Security. The ISU sees all data it has general security access to.

🔗 Endpoint
POST POST https://{tenant}.workday.com/ccx/service/{tenant}/Integrations/v46.0
🌐 REST API
No direct REST equivalent found across: connect v2, businessProcess v1, common v1.
This SOAP operation may be SOAP-only, or the resource uses a different naming convention in the REST API.
SOAP Request — Put_Integration_System_User1 version-gated fields
v46.0
⚠ No version-specific field data for this operation — version change updates the version string in the SOAP header
SOAP Response — Put_Integration_System_User
v46.0

13 validations
Field / ElementOfficial Error Message (Workday API Docs)Description🔧 Fix / How to ResolveSource
Integration_System_User_DataSystem User to be assigned to an Integration System must not be a Worker or Implementer, nor may it already be associated with a different Integration System. Either choose another System User or create a new one.System User to be assigned to an Integration System must not be a Worker or Implementer, nor may it already be associated with a different Integration System. Either choose another System User or create a new one.Review the Integration System configuration. Ensure the correct template type is selected and all required components are defined.API Docs
Integration_System_User_DataPassword is required when creating a new Workday Account.Password is required when creating a new Workday Account.Include a Password element with a valid value in the request.API Docs

Ensure the correct template type is selected and all required components are defined.API Docs
Password [Choice]The password does not meet password requirements.Password must meet password requirements.Ensure the password contains the required mix of uppercase, lowercase, numbers, and special characters as configured in your tenant's password policy.API Docs
Session_Timeout_MinutesSession Timeout Minutes must be greater than 5 and less than or equal to [max]. The default value is [default].Set the value to be greater than 5 and no more than [max]. The default value is [default].API Docs

Grant the appropriate security group membership in Workday security configuration.API Docs

Put_Reference

Write Integrations • v46.0 2 validations 1KB req / 0KB resp
POSTPOST https://{tenant}.workday.com/ccx/service/{tenant}/Integrations/v46.0
📌 API Version: Updates Request & Response  ·  Sourced from Workday XSD v30.0–v46.0
2Validations
0Request Fields
0Response Fields
Write SOAP Op
📖 Description

This operation updates the Reference IDs on a business object for a Reference ID Type. Currently, updating Reference IDs for most, but not all Reference ID Types is supported.

🔐 Contextual Security 🔓 No

This operation does not apply Contextual Security. The ISU sees all data it has general security access to.

🔗 Endpoint
POST POST https://{tenant}.workday.com/ccx/service/{tenant}/Integrations/v46.0
🌐 REST API
No direct REST equivalent found across: connect v2, businessProcess v1, common v1.
This SOAP operation may be SOAP-only, or the resource uses a different naming convention in the REST API.
⚠ No version-specific field data for this operation — version change updates the version string in the SOAP header

Put_Sequence_Generator

Write Integrations • v46.0 1 validations 2KB req / 0KB resp
POSTPOST https://{tenant}.workday.com/ccx/service/{tenant}/Integrations/v46.0
📌 API Version: Updates Request & Response  ·  Sourced from Workday XSD v30.0–v46.0
1Validations
3Request Fields
0Response Fields
Write SOAP Op
📖 Description

This operation will create and/or update data related to a Sequence Generator (e.g ID Definition). Data associated to a Sequence Generator includes the formatting, syntax, last date used, increment value, etc. Sequence Generators are typically associated with Integrations utilizing a Sequence Generator Service.

🔐 Contextual Security 🔓 No

This operation does not apply Contextual Security. The ISU sees all data it has general security access to.

🔗 Endpoint
POST POST https://{tenant}.workday.com/ccx/service/{tenant}/Integrations/v46.0
🌐 REST API

Put_Subscription

Write Integrations • v46.0 33 validations 9KB req / 0KB resp
POSTPOST https://{tenant}.workday.com/ccx/service/{tenant}/Integrations/v46.0
📌 API Version: Updates Request & Response  ·  Sourced from Workday XSD v30.0–v46.0
33Validations
12Request Fields
0Response Fields
Write SOAP Op
📖 Description

This operation will create and/or update data related to Subscriptions, both for an Integration System and for Transaction Log service configuration. A Subscription includes an association with 1 or more Transaction/Business Process Types.

🔐 Contextual Security 🔓 No

This operation does not apply Contextual Security. The ISU sees all data it has general security access to.

🔗 Endpoint
POST POST https://{tenant}.workday.com/ccx/service/{tenant}/Integrations/v46.0
🌐 REST API
No direct REST equivalent found across: connect v2, businessProcess v1, common v1.
This SOAP operation may be SOAP-only, or the resource uses a different naming convention in the REST API.
SOAP Request — Put_Subscription12 version-gated fields
v46.0
⚠ No version-specific field data for this operation — version change updates the version string in the SOAP header
SOAP Response — Put_Subscription
v46.0

33 validations
Field / ElementOfficial Error Message (Workday API Docs)Description🔧 Fix / How to ResolveSource
Subscription_DataEndpoints cannot be defined for this Subscriber. Endpoints can only be defined for Subscribers of type Integration System, because Push Subscription is only supported for Integration System.Review the Integration System configuration. Ensure the correct template type is selected and all required components are defined.API Docs
Subscription_DataA Subscription can not have multiple Endpoints that use the same OMS EnvironmentA Subscription can not have multiple Endpoints that use the same OMS EnvironmentAPI Docs
Subscription_DataA Subscription cannot use 'Subscribe to all Transaction Types' and define Endpoints for Push Subscriptions at the same time. Push Subscriptions are only allowed for Transaction Types that are Business Processes or Event Lites, but not Reorganization Activities.A Subscription cannot use 'Subscribe to all Transaction Types' and define Endpoints for Push Subscriptions at the same time. Push Subscriptions are only allowed for Transaction Types that are Business Processes or Event Lites, but not Reorganization Activities.API Docs

Push Subscriptions are only allowed for Transaction Types that are Business Processes or Event Lites.A Subscription cannot subscribe to Reorganization Activities and define Endpoints for Push Subscriptions at the same time. Push Subscriptions are only allowed for Transaction Types that are Business Processes or Event Lites.API Docs
Subscription_DataA Subscription cannot use 'Subscribe to all Transaction Types except' a list of Transaction Types and define Endpoints for Push Subscriptions at the same time. Push Subscriptions are only allowed for Transaction Types that are Business Processes or Event Lites, but not Reorganization Activities.A Subscription cannot use 'Subscribe to all Transaction Types except' a list of Transaction Types and define Endpoints for Push Subscriptions at the same time. Reassign_Business_Process_Step

Write Integrations • v46.0 7 validations 1KB req / 0KB resp
POSTPOST https://{tenant}.workday.com/ccx/service/{tenant}/Integrations/v46.0
📌 API Version: Updates Request & Response  ·  Sourced from Workday XSD v30.0–v46.0
7Validations
0Request Fields
0Response Fields
Write SOAP Op
📖 Description

This operation reassign a business process step, if reassignable by the processing user and the new assignee has the required Roles to complete the step.

🔐 Contextual Security — Not Applicable

Contextual Security does not apply to this operation (typically because it is a configuration/reference data operation).

🔗 Endpoint
POST POST https://{tenant}.workday.com/ccx/service/{tenant}/Integrations/v46.0
🌐 REST API Equivalent   businessProcess v1 common v1
/eventSteps/{ID}/reassign[businessProcess v1]POSTReassigns the specified business process event step.
/businessTitleChanges/{ID}[common v1]GETRetrieves a business title change instance.
/workers/{ID}/businessTitleChanges[common v1]GETPOSTRetrieves a collection of business title changes for a specific worker.
/workers/{ID}/businessTitleChanges?type=me[common v1]POST
/workers/{ID}/businessTitleChanges/{subresourceID}[common v1]GETRetrieves a business title change instance for a specific worker.
⚠ No version-specific field data for this operation — version change updates the version string in the SOAP header
SOAP Request — Reassign_Business_Process_Step
v46.0
⚠ No version-specific field data for this operation — version change updates the version string in the SOAP header
SOAP Response — Reassign_Business_Process_Step
v46.0
✓ Data Source: Official Workday API Docs  —  7 validation messages scraped directly from the Workday Community Operation Details page for this operation. These are the exact runtime error messages Workday returns.  🔧 7 Fix suggestions
7 validations
Field / ElementOfficial Error Message (Workday API Docs)Description🔧 Fix / How to ResolveSource
Reassign_Business_Process_Step_RequestTypeThe business process step: "[step]" cannot be reassigned to "[role]".Ensure "The business process step: "[step]"" is not "reassigned to "[role]"" — this combination is restricted.API Docs
Reassign_Business_Process_Step_RequestTypeThe processing user does not have the privileges to reassign "[step]".The processing user does not have the privileges to reassign "[step]".API Docs
Reassign_Business_Process_Step_RequestTypeBusiness process step "[step]" are not awaiting "[role]".Review Business Process configuration to ensure this action is enabled and properly set up.API Docs
Reassign_Business_Process_Step_RequestType"Reassign from" field must be specified, the business process step: "[step]" require action from all of the recipients.Review Business Process configuration to ensure this action is enabled and properly set up.API Docs
Reassign_Business_Process_Step_RequestTypeThe business process step: "[step]" is already assigned to "[role]".Review Business Process configuration to ensure this action is enabled and properly set up.API Docs
Reassign_Business_Process_Step_RequestTypeThe business process step "[step]" is configured with DocuSign eSignature integration and cannot be reassigned.Ensure "The business process step "[step]" is configured with DocuSign eSignature integration and" is not "reassigned" — this combination is restricted.API Docs
Reassign_From_ReferenceSpecify a valid value for Reassign From. You can only reassign a task from a person with a role such as: Worker, Student, Extended Enterprise Learner, and Academic Affiliate.Specify a valid value for Reassign From. You can only reassign a task from a person with a role such as: Worker, Student, Extended Enterprise Learner, and Academic Affiliate.API Docs

v1.0AddedOperation introduced.

Rescind_Business_Process

Write Integrations • v46.0 4 validations 1KB req / 0KB resp
POSTPOST https://{tenant}.workday.com/ccx/service/{tenant}/Integrations/v46.0
📌 API Version: Updates Request & Response  ·  Sourced from Workday XSD v30.0–v46.0
4Validations
0Request Fields
0Response Fields
Write SOAP Op
📖 Description

This operation rescinds a business process, if rescindable by the user

🔐 Contextual Security — Not Applicable

Contextual Security does not apply to this operation (typically because it is a configuration/reference data operation).

🔗 Endpoint
POST POST https://{tenant}.workday.com/ccx/service/{tenant}/Integrations/v46.0
🌐 REST API Equivalent   businessProcess v1 common v1

/businessTitleChanges/{ID}[common v1]GETRetrieves a business title change instance.
/workers/{ID}/businessTitleChanges[common v1]GETPOSTRetrieves a collection of business title changes for a specific worker.
/workers/{ID}/businessTitleChanges?type=me[common v1]POST
/workers/{ID}/businessTitleChanges/{subresourceID}[common v1]GETRetrieves a business title change instance for a specific worker.

Event_ReferenceBusiness Process cannot be rescinded via Web Service.The provided event cannot be rescinded via Web Service.This action (rescinded) cannot be performed via the Web Services API. Complete the action manually in the Workday UI instead.API Docs

Send_Back_Business_Process

Write Integrations • v46.0 2 validations 1KB req / 0KB resp
POSTPOST https://{tenant}.workday.com/ccx/service/{tenant}/Integrations/v46.0
📌 API Version: Updates Request & Response  ·  Sourced from Workday XSD v30.0–v46.0
2Validations
7Request Fields
2Response Fields
Write SOAP Op
📖 Description

This operation sends back a business process to a completed step, if the processing user is allowed to send back the business process.

🔐 Contextual Security — Not Applicable

Contextual Security does not apply to this operation (typically because it is a configuration/reference data operation).

🔗 Endpoint
POST POST https://{tenant}.workday.com/ccx/service/{tenant}/Integrations/v46.0
🌐 REST API Equivalent   businessProcess v1 connect v2 common v1
/values/sendBack/to/[businessProcess v1]GET
/eventSteps/{ID}/sendBack[businessProcess v1]POSTSends back a business process event step.
/sendMessage[connect v2]POSTsendMessage API
/businessTitleChanges/{ID}[common v1]GETRetrieves a business title change instance.
/workers/{ID}/businessTitleChanges[common v1]GETPOSTRetrieves a collection of business title changes for a specific worker.
/workers/{ID}/businessTitleChanges?type=me[common v1]POST
/workers/{ID}/businessTitleChanges/{subresourceID}[common v1]GETRetrieves a business title change instance for a specific worker.
